plugins.name: cost-oriented-agentic-workflow
plugins.description: Token-economy agentic workflow for Claude Code: Opus plans, routes, and adjudicates; a Sonnet subagent does the token-heavy writing; independent Sonnet reviewers gate quality by risk; the controller stays lean. Standard and production modes.
